_purpose: VERDICT 067 fixtures — every registered constant copied verbatim from the PROPOSAL 056 block (idea-engine control/outbox.md @ main adc641fe33c479d74ff60b0614725477058c53a8, landed via idea-engine PR #387) / idea doc ideas/fleet/inspection-paradox-wait-inflation-2026-07-14.md @ ae0e038. Committed BEFORE the runner. The runner reads ONLY this file. All exact values are strings parsed as fractions.Fraction.

registration.folk_rule: mean headway mu => expected wait mu/2, i.e. rho = 1; mu = 10 => folk E[W] = 5
registration.incidence_convention: passenger lands uniformly at random over a long operating window; wait W = time to next arrival; continuous-uniform position within the containing integer-minute gap

geometric_crosscheck.tail_method: exact tail formulas via the memoryless shift identity: sum_{k>K} f(k) p(k) = r^K * E[f(K+Y)], Y ~ Geom(q), r = 1-q

decision_rules.REJECT: rho(BUNCHED) >= 2 AND rho >= 11/10 in >= 3 of the 4 stochastic cells AND Arm S confirms within the agreement gate on every stochastic cell — checked FIRST
decision_rules.INVALID: controls misbehaving — report, no ruling: F1 pmf re-derivation (mass = 1, mean = 10, variances {0, 4, 10, 90, 256} exact; geometric closed-form vs partial-sum agreement), F2 size-bias identities (E[L] = E[X^2]/E[X] two independent ways AND E[W] = E[L]/2 exact), F3 CLOCKWORK degenerate (rho = 1, P(W > 10) = 0, E[W] = 5 exact), F4 monotonicity (rho = 1 + Var/100 exact per cell ranking the five cells by variance; P(W > w) non-increasing in w; the mean-preserving-spread ordering on rho), F5 hand identities (JITTER P(W > 8) = 1/5 and E[W] = 26/5; BUNCHED rider-share-in-the-42-gap = 21/25 and P(W > 10) = 16/25; MEMORYLESS P(W > 10) = (9/10)^10 exact), or the Arm-S agreement gate failing on any cell
decision_rules.APPROVE: rho <= 21/20 at EVERY stochastic cell AND the seed-20261362 stability leg (K = 20,000, N = 50,000) reproduces the ruling through twin evaluators
decision_rules.NULL: anything else — pre-registered axes: band-straddle (rho(BUNCHED) in (21/20, 2), or the 3-of-4 leg misses while BUNCHED fires); dispersion-sensitivity (the ruling flips between the low-CV and high-CV halves); arm disagreement

registration.arm_a: DECISION arm, seedless exact fractions.Fraction moment arithmetic per cell; geometric via closed forms cross-checked against exact rational partial sums to K = 500 plus exact tail formulas; byte-identical across process runs; platform-independent

arm_s.wait_method: N uniform landings on [0, T); waits via bisect; containing-gap lengths recorded

stability_leg.requirement: reproduces the ruling through twin independently-written decision evaluators

aux_seed.rule: reserved, NEVER read by any decision number

boundaries_registered.iid: real bus bunching is positively correlated, which pushes the length-biased experience WORSE, so an i.i.d. REJECT is robust in the costly direction
boundaries_registered.incidence: continuous-uniform landing within integer-minute gaps is the pin; integer-landing alternatives shift E[W] by <= 1/2 min, reporting-only
boundaries_registered.discretization: the continuous-exponential analog gives rho exactly 2; the discrete geometric lands 19/10 — disclosed, not laundered

drafter_reference_never_gated.note: SPREAD disclosed exactly ON the 11/10 edge; JITTER disclosed genuinely APPROVE-side at 26/25; all re-derived from scratch, compared, never trusted

fixture_level_choices_disclosed.rng_stream: ONE random.Random per leg (headline 20261361 / stability 20261362 / reporting 20261363), consumed sequentially across the stochastic cells in the pinned order JITTER -> SPREAD -> MEMORYLESS -> BUNCHED; the registration's 'all intervals before any landing' is applied PER CELL: each cell's K intervals are fully drawn before that cell's N landings, then the stream moves to the next cell
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.uniform_only_draws: every random variate is a single rng.random() U(0,1) draw (no randrange/choice/getrandbits), so draw sentinels count rng.random() calls exactly

interval_maps.SPREAD: 5 + int(u * 11) (one draw; u < 1 so the bucket is in {0..10})
interval_maps.MEMORYLESS: count of Bernoulli(1/10) trials to first success: draw u until u < 1/10; X = number of draws (X draws total)

fixture_level_choices_disclosed.landing_map: t = u * T with T = sum of the cell's intervals (one draw per landing); containing gap and wait via bisect_right over the integer cumulative arrival times; W = cum[idx] - t, L = intervals[idx]
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.draw_sentinels: per cell: interval draws == K for JITTER/SPREAD/BUNCHED and == T (sum of intervals) for MEMORYLESS; landing draws == N; asserted exactly per leg
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.se_convention: exact-variance SE (the V064 precedent): SE(E[W]) = sqrt(Var_exact(W)/N) with Var(W) = E[X^3]/(3*E[X]) - E[W]^2 (E[W^2] = E[L^2]/3 = E[X^3]/(3*E[X]) under continuous-uniform position); SE(P(W>10)) = sqrt(p*(1-p)/N) with p exact; geometric E[X^3] closed form (6 - 6q + q^2)/q^3 cross-checked by partial sum to K = 500 plus the exact shift-identity tail
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.agreement_gate_literal: PASS iff |est - exact|/exact <= 1/100 AND |est - exact| <= 4*SE, on E[W] AND on P(W > 10), per stochastic cell (the registered AND of both halves on both metrics)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.stability_evaluation: the stability leg reruns the identical MC pipeline at seed 20261362 (K = 20,000, N = 50,000) and the twin evaluators re-run the FULL registered rule order with the stability estimates in the Arm-S slot (gate SE at N = 50,000); reproduction = same class as the headline ruling
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.reporting_leg_size: K = 20,000, N = 50,000 (not pinned by the registration; the V064 control-size precedent), seed 20261363; MC median/P90 = order statistics at ranks ceil(N/2) and ceil(9N/10) of the sorted waits; exact reference medians/P90s computed by piecewise-linear inversion of the exact exceedance G(w) = E[(X-w)^+]/E[X] between integer breakpoints (reporting only)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.twin_evaluators: evaluator TE1 compares fractions.Fraction objects directly; evaluator TE2 is independently written over (numerator, denominator) integer pairs using pure integer cross-multiplication; both execute the registered order REJECT -> INVALID -> APPROVE -> NULL and must agree on headline and stability classes
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.rng_registry: the ONLY RNGs constructed are 20261361 / 20261362 / 20261363 in that order; aux 20261364 is asserted never-constructed and never-read
fixture_level_choices_disclosed.cpython_pin: 3.11 (asserted at runtime; Arm A is platform-independent exact rationals, Arm S byte-stability is pinned to this minor)
